title: attached instance
text: attached instance A component instance that is created by another component, and whose existence depends on the calling component. The new instance is said to be "attached" to the component that creates it. Attached component instances are deleted when the calling component exits. Related Links component instance In Uniface, a copy of a component that is created at runtime when the newinstance statement is executed (explicitly or implicitly). It has a defined interface that can be used to invoke operations via the activate statement and handles, and returns the object reference in a handle. detached instance A component instance that is not attached to the component that creates it.
